[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111 a
1 1111111 a
2 1111111 a
3 1111111 a
4 0001110 3
5 0000110 2
6 0100111 4
7 1110011 5

23 32 1011101 5
34 43 1111111 a match 0 1 2 3
45 54 1111111 a match 0 1 2 3
56 65 0101100 3
67 76 1001110 4
70 07 1110111 6
